heading: Report to Congress
label: 217 Report to Congress
text: If, after appropriate investigation and consultation with the Surgeon General carried out after the expiration of the 24-month period following , the Secretary finds that available scientific information would justify a change in, addition to, or deletion of the statement, or any part thereof, set forth in , the Secretary shall promptly report such information to the Congress together with specific recommendations for such amendments to this subchapter as the Secretary determines to be appropriate and in the public interest.November 18, 1988section 215(a) of this title
